description.en: An alternate constructor that bypasses the constructor’s cache. It is identical to the primary constructor, but returns a new object on each call. This is most likely to be useful for testing or demonstration purposes, but it can also be used to create a system with a different cache invalidation strategy. Objects created via this constructor will also bypass the cache of a deserializing process when unpickled. Caution Using this constructor may change the semantics of your datetimes in surpr...
